title: Iranecio farfarifolius
taxonomy: Iranecio farfarifolius is classified within the plant family Asteraceae. This classification places it within a broad group of flowering plants, specifically those with composite flowers. Further, it is sometimes grouped under the genus Senecio, but recent studies have led to its reclassification under the genus Iranecio. As a member of the Asteraceae family, Iranecio farfarifolius is closely related to other dandelion-like plants. The exact classification of this plant continues to evolve with ongoing research in plant taxonomy.
